nasb.text: and after them seven years of famine will come, and all the abundance will be forgotten in the land of Egypt, and the famine will ravage the land.

esv.text: but after them there will arise seven years of famine, and all the plenty will be forgotten in the land of Egypt. The famine will consume the land,

cnv.text: 接著又必有七年饑荒；甚至埃及地所有的豐收都被人忘記了，饑荒必把這地毀滅。

ccb.text: 随后是七年饥荒肆虐全国，之前的丰收将被忘记。

csbs.text: 随后七个荒年就来临，埃及地先前一切的丰收都将被遗忘，饥荒必毁灭这地。
